title: Skyrim Combat
description: Bring the weapons and armor from Skyrim into Minecraft!
body:
# Skyrim Combat

Bring the legendary weapons and armor of Skyrim into Minecraft! This mod adds an extensive collection of craftable gear inspired by The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim.

## Features

### Weapon & Armor Sets

This mod includes 15+ complete armor and weapon sets, each with their own unique stats and appearances:

- Ancient Nord - Ancient warrior gear from Skyrim's past
- Daedric - Powerful demonic equipment forged with Daedra Hearts
- Dragonbone - Legendary gear crafted from dragon remains
- Dwarven - Advanced automaton metal equipment
- Ebony - Dark volcanic glass armor and weapons
- Elven - Elegant refined gear of the Altmer
- Falmer - Twisted equipment of the snow elves
- Glass - Striking green malachite equipment
- Imperial - Standard-issue Legion equipment
- Iron - Basic craftable gear
- Orcish - Heavy orichalcum equipment of the Orcs
- Steel - Sturdy steel gear
- Stormcloak Officer - Rebellion military equipment
- Scaled Armor - Lightweight dragon-scale armor
- Hide Armor - Basic leather protection

### Weapon Types

Each weapon set includes multiple weapon types:

- Daggers
- Swords
- Greatswords (two-handed)
- War Axes
- Battleaxes (two-handed)
- Maces
- Warhammers (two-handed)
- Bows
- Shields
- Arrows

### New Ores & Materials

Mine new ores found throughout your world:
- 
- Corundum Ore
- Ebony Ore
- Malachite Ore
- Moonstone Ore
- Orichalcum Ore
- Quicksilver Ore
- Silver Ore

Smelt these ores to create ingots, then craft them into powerful equipment!


### Special Items

Daedra Hearts - Rare material needed for Daedric equipment
Leather Strips - Crafted from leather, used in many recipes
Unique Weapons - Chillrend and Dawnbreaker

### Custom Crafting Stations

**Blacksmith Forge**
The primary crafting station for all weapons and armor. Craft this early to begin your journey into Skyrim-style equipment crafting.


## How to Obtain Items

### Ancient Nord, Imperial & Stormcloak Equipment
These historical armor sets and weapons cannot be crafted. Instead, they can be found as:

### Dungeon loot in chests and structures throughout your world
Rare treasures waiting to be discovered by adventurers

### Daedra Hearts
This rare demonic material required for Daedric equipment can be obtained through:

### Dungeon loot chests
Sniffer digging - Let your Sniffer discover these rare items
Archaeology - Brush suspicious blocks to uncover ancient Daedra Hearts

### Leather Strips
Required for many crafting recipes, Leather Strips are crafted from regular leather at a crafting table.

### All Other Equipment
Everything else in this mod is crafted at the Blacksmith Forge:


## Future Plans

- Enchanting system via the Arcane Enchanter
- Additional unique weapons from Skyrim

## Credits
Inspired by The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim by Bethesda Game Studios. This is a fan-made mod and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Bethesda.
